headline: Epstein Settlement Puts Bank Of America Valuation And Governance In Focus
summary: Bank of America, NYSE:BAC, has agreed to settle a lawsuit over its past relationship with Jeffrey Epstein and alleged failures to promptly report suspicious activities. The settlement addresses claims that the bank maintained Epstein related accounts and delayed filing required suspicious activity reports. This outcome brings a legal resolution to issues that raised questions about the bank's compliance controls and oversight of high risk clients. For investors watching NYSE:BAC, this legal...

headline: Stock-Market Euphoria Fades as Investors Turn Bearish, BofA Says
summary: The bank’s broadest measure of the market’s mood fell to a six-month low in March and cash levels surged, strategist Michael Hartnett wrote in a note.  Participants cited the ongoing war in Iran and turmoil in private credit as reasons to be nervous.  For the eighth month in a row, respondents said that private equity and private credit are the most likely source of a “systemic credit event.”

content.title: Stock-Market Euphoria Fades as Investors Turn Bearish, BofA Says
content.summary: The bank’s broadest measure of the market’s mood fell to a six-month low in March and cash levels surged, strategist Michael Hartnett wrote in a note.  Participants cited the ongoing war in Iran and turmoil in private credit as reasons to be nervous.  For the eighth month in a row, respondents said that private equity and private credit are the most likely source of a “systemic credit event.”

headline: UK Bank of England expected to hold rates amid energy price surge
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America expects the Bank of England to keep its Bank Rate unchanged in March as policymakers assess the impact of rising energy prices following the Iran conflict, according to a research note published Tuesday.

content.summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America expects the Bank of England to keep its Bank Rate unchanged in March as policymakers assess the impact of rising energy prices following the Iran conflict, according to a research note published Tuesday.

headline: 'Frothy Bull' Market Is Pretty Much Over, Fund Managers Say
summary: More investors are turning bearish. That’s the verdict of the latest survey of global fund managers from Bank of America, which showed that war in the Middle East and private-credit concerns have ended the “frothy bull” sentiment of recent months.

headline: Umicore - Transparency notification by Bank of America Corporation
summary: Transparency notification byBank of America Corporation In accordance with article 14, § 1 of the law of 2 May 2007 on the disclosure of major holdings, Umicore was recently notified by Bank of America Corporation that it has crossed the legal threshold of 3% for the equivalent financial instruments upwards on 10 March 2026. The total holding of direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments of Bank of America Corporation stands at 3.60% on 13 March 2026. Summary of the move by Bank o

headline: Galapagos Receives Transparency Notification from Bank of America
summary: Mechelen, Belgium; March 117, 2026, 22:01 CET; regulated information – Galapagos NV (Euronext & NASDAQ: GLPG) received a transparency notification from Bank of America. Pursuant to Belgian transparency legislation1, Galapagos received transparency notification from Bank of America Corporation on March 12, 2026.
